headline: Industrial Stocks Are Rallying. Beware of This Looming Risk.
summary: Industrial and manufacturing stocks have been strong amid the AI data center building boom, record commercial aerospace demand, and record military spending.  Things were getting even better with other areas of the industrial economy picking up, promising to add to growth rates for suppliers of parts and equipment.  Inflation has reared its ugly head again.

headline: Vineyard Wind Lawsuit Tests GE Vernova Offshore Contract And Risk Story
summary: Vineyard Wind has filed a lawsuit against GE Vernova, challenging the company’s attempt to exit a major offshore wind turbine supply and maintenance contract. The dispute centers on alleged defective turbine blades and withheld payments tied to a large offshore wind project. The case puts a spotlight on GE Vernova’s contract risk, operational reliability, and relationships with key customers in offshore wind. For investors watching NYSE:GEV, the legal dispute arrives after a period of...
